productDisplayName: Converse Men's Poormn Team Black Canvas Shoe
description: Dressed in bright canvas upper, converse&rsquo s latest release is hard to miss. This Poorman Pro Team Ox is sure to turn some heads with its given colorway, while its basic color blocking and white vulcanized sole keep it from being overbearing. The Star Chevron and embossed quarter panel are all suede and optional white laces are included.Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability cap-toe front with overlay of canvas Long and lightly padded canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Seven-eye lace-up front with reinforced, metallic eyelets for a secure fit and feel Classic Star Chevron logo in suede Midsole Comfort Insole made of contoured latex foam for high energy return and cushioning Rubber toe bumper, tonal sidewall trim Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
